title: Emergencies
description: Get help fast: medical, police, and urgent situations explained in clear Japanese.
situation: Urgent help: calling for assistance, reporting illness or accidents, finding a hospital, and contacting police.

phrases.tip: A short, urgent cry for help; raise your voice and say it clearly.

phrases.native: 救急車を呼んでください
phrases.tip: The emergency number for fire and ambulance in Japan is 119.

phrases.native: 警察を呼んでください
phrases.tip: The police number in Japan is 110.

phrases.native: 道に迷って困っています
英語を話せる人はいますか
phrases.transliteration: eigo o hanaseru hito wa imasu ka
phrases.english: Is there someone who speaks English?
phrases.pronunciation: ay-goh oh hah-nah-seh-roo hee-toh wah ee-mahs kah

phrases.native: アレルギーがあります
phrases.tip: Critical at hospitals; name the cause, e.g. ペニシリン (penishirin, penicillin).

phrases.native: 大使館に連絡したいです
phrases.english: I want to contact my embassy
